subject: An elf-like figure in light armor recoiling in terror as a pale Eldrazi tendril-creature wraps around their arm — face contorted in a scream, clearly being corrupted or consumed
description: A close-up, high-drama scene showing a light-armored humanoid figure — visibly elf-coded by pointed ear tips — recoiling with mouth open in a scream. The figure's arm is gripped by a pale, slender Eldrazi creature: a mass of pink-red tendrils and a smooth elongated pale body, clearly in the Eldrazi biological register. The creature wraps around the figure's forearm. The background is pale and diffuse. The contrast is stark: the humanoid's warm flesh tones and golden armor against the Eldrazi's cold blue-white and pink visceral palette. The elf figure's free arm reaches toward the viewer. The interaction clearly depicts contact-corruption or a killing grip.
foreground: Armored elf-like figure recoiling, arm gripped by Eldrazi tendril-creature
